CustomField.description: When populated, work logs created after this date require approval before syncing to client orgs. When null, approval is not required (current behavior preserved). Provides an audit trail of when the policy was enabled.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Set this to enable work log approval. Logs created after this date are saved as Draft until approved. Leave blank to sync immediately (default).
CustomField.label: Require Work Log Approval Since
